body.--accent-1: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) l c calc(h + 30))
body.--accent-2: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) l c calc(h + 330))
body.--blockquote-border-color: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) 50% c h / 75%)
body.--bold-color:
oklch(
    from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) calc(70% + 10%) 20%
      calc(h + 100)
  )
body.--interactive-active: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) 50% c h / 50%)
body.--italic-color:
oklch(
    from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) calc(70% + 10%) 20%
      calc(h + 200)
  )
body.--nav-item-background-selected: oklch(from oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) l c calc(h + 330)) 45% c h / 75%)
body.--outline-color: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) 25% c h)
body.--retroma-folder-border:
1px solid
    oklch(from oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) l c calc(h + 330)) 55% 20% h / 50%)
body.--slider-track-background: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) 50% c h / 50%)
body.--strong-emphasis:
oklch(
    from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) calc(70% + 10%) 20%
      calc(h + 200)
  )
body.--table-data-background: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) l c h / 7%)
body.--table-header-background: oklch(from oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) l c calc(h + 30)) 50% c h / 30%)
body.--tag-color: oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) 80% c h / 75%)
body.--text-highlight-bg: oklch(from oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) l c calc(h + 30)) 50% 20% h / 75%)
body.--text-selection: oklch(from oklch(from oklch(from hsl(258, 88%, 66%) l c h) l c calc(h + 330)) 45% c h / 75%)
